summary: Clear dissatisfaction—redirect with detailed corrections needed
detailed_context: The AI provided a generic summary about OpenCode v1.16.2 when Dominic was asking about accessing a specific Hermes instance running in his environment. Dominic's 'try again' signals clear dissatisfaction. By spelling out exact technical details (tmux:3, /home/jellybot, .hermes folder), Dominic is providing corrections after the AI missed the actual request. This is a straightforward miss—the AI didn't attempt to access or investigate the Hermes system as instructed; it defaulted to a generic lookup instead.
